steps.title: Identify the graph axes and parabola direction
steps.content: The graph plots estimated revenue (y-axis) against price (x-axis). The parabola opens downward, with its peak at the vertex.

steps.title: Interpret the y-coordinate of the vertex
steps.content:
For any function, the x-coordinate of the vertex is the input value (price) and the y-coordinate is the output value (revenue).

Since this parabola opens downward, the vertex is the highest point on the curve.

The y-value at this highest point represents the maximum revenue the company can achieve.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
